name: German Chocolate Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, and cocoa in a bowl.
2. Stir in evaporated milk, vanilla, eggs, and melted butter.
3. Blend well.
4. Stir in coconut and pecans.
5. Turn batter into 2 pie shells.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until set around the edges.
7. Cool and refrigerate.
8. One pie to eat and one pie to freeze for later. The pies freeze well.
